source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
The time of day (the Revised Version (British and American) reads "at even," margin, "between the two evenings") when the Passover lamb was slain (Ex 12:6; Nu 9:3), or the offering made of the evening portion of the continual burnt offering (Nu 28:4).

See preceding article.

�
